Duet: A Kobeerian freighter transports a sick Cardassian visitor to DS9. Kira, however, suspects that he could actually be a notorious war criminal.
Shades Of Grey: O'Neill commits an indiscretion which jeopardises Earth's diplomatic relations with its allies. (S3, ep 18)
Nightingale: While searching for dilithium, the Delta Flyer, under Harry's command, comes to the aid of a ship under attack. (S7, ep 8)
Encounter at Farpoint - Part 1: The crew of the Enterprise are put on trial, for all the crimes of mankind, by a mysterious force called 'Q'.

The Son Also Rises: After Nick rushes to help Eve, Hank and Wu are left to investigate an attack on a group of scientists. (S6, ep 8)
Not How We Do Business: With the enterprise going well, Young Jun shares his worries with Ah Sahm about the new men Father Jun has brought over from China. (S2, ep 3)

New Ground: SG-1's arrival on a planet makes them pawns in an ideological war. (S3, ep 19)

Encounter at Farpoint - Part 2: At the trial, as Q continues to denounce humans, Picard comes with up with a way to defend his race.
Future Epidemic: An anomaly from the future appears in a millionaire's apartment, bringing with it a deadly fungus. An intruder in the ARC turns out to be Danny Quinn. (S3, ep 5)
The Head on the Beach Murder: When body parts wash up on a beach in Arbroath, forensic investigators must unravel the disturbing truth behind a woman's death. (S2, ep 9)

programmes.show_name: The Good, The Bad And The Ugly
programmes.show_description: A bounty-hunting scam joins two men in an uneasy alliance against a third in a race to find a fortune in gold buried in a remote cemetery. Clint Eastwood's sprawling Western epic. (1966)
